title: Myntra Home Page Clone
objective: Build a pixel-perfect, responsive clone of the Myntra desktop homepage.
mustInclude: Sticky nav bar with working dropdown hover states
Image carousel for the main hero banners
Dynamic product grid using CSS Grid or Flexbox
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo, hosted live via Vercel or GitHub Pages.

title: Weather Dashboard
objective: Build a weather lookup app that calls a public weather API and displays a 5-day forecast.
mustInclude: City search with debounced input
Current conditions card (temp, humidity, wind)
5-day forecast strip with icons
Graceful error state for an invalid city
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo, hosted live. API key must not be committed to the repo.

title: JavaScript Calculator
objective: Build a working calculator supporting the four basic operations plus keyboard input.
mustInclude: Keyboard support, not just on-screen buttons
Correct operator precedence for chained operations
Clear/backspace handling without breaking state

title: Streaming Service Landing Page
objective: Build a Netflix-style landing/browse page with horizontally scrolling content rows.
mustInclude: Horizontally scrollable rows with hover-to-preview on cards
Sticky header that changes style on scroll
Fully responsive down to mobile width

title: Drag-and-Drop Kanban Board
objective: Build a Trello-style board where cards can be dragged between columns.
mustInclude: At least 3 columns (e.g. To Do / In Progress / Done)
Cards persist their column after a page refresh
Add and delete card functionality

title: E-commerce Backend API
objective: Build a REST API covering products, cart, and order creation for a simple store.
mustInclude: CRUD endpoints for products
Cart endpoints (add/remove/update quantity)
Order creation endpoint that validates stock and cart contents
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo with a README documenting every endpoint.

title: URL Shortener Service
objective: Build a service that shortens long URLs and redirects visitors to the original.
mustInclude: Collision-safe short-code generation
Redirect endpoint with correct HTTP status code
Basic click-count tracking per shortened URL
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo, deployed (Render/Railway/Fly.io all fine), README with example requests.

title: Blog API with Authentication
objective: Build a REST API for a blog with JWT-based authentication for post creation and editing.
mustInclude: Signup/login endpoints issuing a JWT
Only the post's author can edit or delete it
Public read endpoints for posts, no auth required
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo with a README documenting auth flow and endpoints.

title: Real-Time Chat Backend
objective: Build a WebSocket-based backend supporting multiple chat rooms.
mustInclude: Join/leave room events
Message broadcast scoped to the correct room only
Basic reconnect handling
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo with setup instructions and a minimal test client.

title: Expense Tracker API
objective: Build a REST API to log expenses and return category-wise monthly summaries.
mustInclude: CRUD endpoints for expenses
Summary endpoint grouped by category and month
Input validation (amount, date, category required)
submissionNotes: Public GitHub repo with a README documenting every endpoint.
